title: 04.24.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: April 24, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: 04.24.26 Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and
Code Enforcement Service Requests
This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic
Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for April 17, 2026
through April 23, 2026.
The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.subcategory: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, Code Enforcement Service Requests
fields.tldr: This memorandum transmits weekly activity reports to the Mayor and City Council for the period of April 17–23, 2026. It covers public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail individual requests by reference number, date, requester, and category. The bulk of visible records requests involve police reports, traffic accidents, background checks, building permits, and 911 dispatch records.
fields.key_stats: Weekly reporting period: April 17–23, 2026. Visible public records requests span reference numbers P020549 through G020621+, covering at least 70+ individual requests across police, fire, and general categories on April 17, 2026 alone. Frequent requesters include Jamie Pulver (multiple fire and general records), WCHSA CPS (multiple police reports, photos, and 911 records), OPM (multiple background requests), Sharleen Barnes (multiple police reports), and Ali Fleming (multiple building permit records).
fields.action_items: Mayor and City Council to review attached weekly reports: (A) Public records requests from City Clerk's Office, (B) Media requests from Strategic Communications, (C) Code enforcement service requests from Code Enforcement.
